name: 訂婚宴大屏幕播放醜聞影片
name_en: Engagement banquet scandal video on big screen
description: 在盛大的訂婚宴上，大屏幕突然播出養女與未婚夫的私密影片。上流社會的體面被瞬間撕碎，公開場合的羞辱製造最大的社會性死亡效果。
tags: 宴會的華麗vs.影片的不堪 + 賓客的震驚反應 + 養女的崩潰

examples.drama_title: 【ENG DUB】From Convict to Heiress: The Real Daughter's Revenge
examples.excerpt: Look, who is that in the video? Never thought the second food daughter not only has poor character, but plays so wildly in private. ... Why won't it turn off? ... No, it's not like that. Ancient brother, save me.
examples.context: 宴會的華麗vs.影片的不堪 + 賓客的震驚反應 + 養女的崩潰
